message: A summer day.
I walked along the side of the road.
The rays of a summer sun pierced me.
A blue sky stretched overhead.
Great white clouds dotted the sky.
The trees were full of green.
I walked through just such a scene.
Every time the wind blew, I smelled the wild grass.
The babbling of a brook.
The smell of earth under our feet.
My father was born in this town.
It was called Sawaimura.
Though, to be honest, I couldn't tell you where it was located in Japan.
Both the summers and winters, though, were colder than those in Tokyo.
As a young boy, that was all I understood about this place.

name: Tomosane
message: "Um... Hasaki should be coming soon, right?"
I checked the time.
People in this village don't seem to pay attention to the time like we do in the city, so I had to bring an alarm clock from home.
It was already long past the time we promised to meet.
The alarm I had set already rang a long time ago.
It was probably pointless setting an alarm in the first place.

name: Tomosane
message: "They said they were coming at three o'clock in the afternoon. Jeez."
Hasaki was coming to Sawaimura.
To get away from that damn witch, especially now that our father was being hospitalized.

name: Tomosane
message: "I wish he would just divorce that stupid witch."
"Hahaha... You shouldn't say that."

name: Tomosane
message: "What? Whoa!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? D-Dad?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Tomosane-kun, how have you been?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Which tree did you pop out from?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Sorry, sorry. It takes a long time to walk from the bus station."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh. So, where's Hasaki?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Eek!"
Someone jumped in surprise and then hid behind Dad's leg.
She was very small, but even she couldn't completely hide herself behind him.

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, are you hiding again?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Ahaha. Come on, Hasaki-san. It's okay."

name: Tomosane
message: "C'mon, why are you hiding? Did you forget me already? It's only been three years."

name: Hiroo
message: "Don't say that. Hasaki was still little when you were in Tokyo."

name: Tomosane
message: "So she doesn't remember me?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Well, maybe she doesn't."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, are you my brother?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right! I'm Tomosane, your brother!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you hiding again?!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Come on now, don't yell at her. She's scared of you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji is the scary one, not me."

name: Hiroo
message: "W-Well, you might be right about that..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is Takuji the same as ever?"

name: Hiroo
message: "I guess so."

name: Tomosane
message: "Are they still abusing Hasaki?"

name: Hiroo
message: "No, there's no abuse, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It is abuse. That stupid witch... You should just let Hasaki live here."

name: Hiroo
message: "Hahaha... You really don't like your mom, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not! She betrayed us! I'll never forgive her!"

name: Hiroo
message: "I'm sorry to hear that. You should be mad at me, not your mother."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you always say that?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why don't you just give that stupid Takuji a good slap in the face?! Or that woman?!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Violence isn't the answer here."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Takuji is using violence against Hasaki, isn't he?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Well... I'm watching out for that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez... You're scared of that woman, aren't you?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Tomosane-kun, you really shouldn't call your mother 'that woman.'"

name: Tomosane
message: "She's not my mother. I've told you before, she was the first one to betray us."

name: Hiroo
message: "Yeah, I understand your feelings, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm stuck out here because you won't break up with that woman."

name: Hiroo
message: "Sorry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, why are you apologizing? Why don't you just break up with her?"

name: Tomosane
message: "She has Takuji. Isn't that enough for her?"

name: Hiroo
message: "That's not true. Your mother loves you and Hasaki too."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's impossible!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Come on, don't yell. You're scaring Hasaki-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I care!"

name: Hasaki
message: "H-Hau..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What does 'hau' even mean?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah, auh, auh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Make up your mind already!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Stop it. You're scaring her."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hmph."

name: Hiroo
message: "I have to head back to the city tomorrow."

name: Tomosane
message: "Tomorrow? That soon?"

name: Hiroo
message: "I'm going to be in the hospital for a while starting tomorrow."

name: Tomosane
message: "Tomorrow? I thought you still had more time. That's too soon."

name: Hiroo
message: "Don't worry, they just want to do some tests. I should be out in a few days."

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course you will. What would our family do without you? Hurry up and get better."

name: Hiroo
message: "Ahaha, I knew you would say that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I'm glad I didn't disappoint you, then."

name: Hasaki
message: "Daddy, please come back soon."

name: Hiroo
message: "Yeah, don't worry about me."

name: Hasaki
message: "He's really scary, so if you don't..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, you mean me?!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Sure sounds like it."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not scary!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hau!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't just keep making that sound!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, I can't believe this wimp is actually related to me."

name: Hiroo
message: "Hasaki is a girl. She's not tough like you boys are."

name: Tomosane
message: "But girls should be tough too!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Why do you think that? She's a girl, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee is super strong, though."

name: Hiroo
message: "Yuki-nee? Who's that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki-nee, the assistant here at the dojo. That violent woman."

name: Hiroo
message: "Here at the dojo? Minakami-san... Oh, you mean old Minakami-san's girl. She's always been a strong girl."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, her. There aren't very many people at the dojo who can beat her. It's not like girls have to be weak. You're really behind the times, you know? I mean, look at your wife. She's stronger than you are."

name: Hiroo
message: "W-Well, that's true..."

name: Tomosane
message: "So, Hasaki!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't say 'auh'! Say 'Yes, sir'!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yessauh!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Which one was that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You'll get stronger living here."

name: Hasaki
message: "S-Stronger?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, a lot stronger."

name: Hiroo
message: "She doesn't need to get stronger."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, she does! Takuji's still bullying her, isn't he?"

name: Hiroo
message: "B-But she shouldn't use violence..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Jeez, that's why he keeps doing it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did Takuji get any stronger, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "He was always a mouthy kid, so I used to fight him sometimes. Is he stronger than he used to be?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Well, it's not like Hasaki is hitting back. It's just Takuji doing it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, and every time we fought, that dumb witch would hit me. Why is it any of her business what we do?"

name: Hiroo
message: "I'm sure she was just stopping you guys from fighting."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, she wasn't. She always takes Takuji's side. That's why I had to hit her too."

name: Hiroo
message: "And that's why we had to send you out here, you know."

name: Hiroo
message: "Jeez... Domestic violence at your age..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I said, that woman is not my mother. And I can't believe you forgave her for what she did."

name: Hiroo
message: "Tomosane-kun..."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I can't hate you, so make sure you rest up and get better in the hospital."

name: Hiroo
message: "Hahaha, thanks."

name: Tomosane
message: "And Hasaki should stay here all year round, not just during the summer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji and that woman aren't here, so it's a lot more peaceful."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But I want to be with Daddy..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ahaha, that's just a matter of time. If you were here, I'm sure he would give up and come live with us."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Would you, Daddy?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Hey, don't I get a say in all this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Anyway, Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Takuji is bullying you, isn't he?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Hasaki
message: "It's my fault Takuji Nii-san is still an inadequate savior."

name: Tomosane
message: "Dad...
Don't let her think like that!"

name: Hiroo
message: "I already told her that's not true."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Takuji and that woman are still saying that... Unbelievable."

name: Hiroo
message: "Yeah. I told her to stop, but she won't listen."

name: Tomosane
message: "She won't listen to anything you say, Dad. That's just how she is."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, whatever.
Hasaki!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're still getting bullied by Takuji, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "He pinches you and hits you and stuff, right?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then you know exactly what it feels like when someone hurts you."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I guess..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then you should understand the opposite, too."

name: Hasaki
message: "The opposite?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course. If you only get hit, then you'll never understand the world. You can only understand it by getting hit and then hitting back."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hitting back?"

name: Hiroo
message: "Tomosane-kun, don't teach her weird stuff like that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Boys hit and get hit by each other, but that just helps them understand each other."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But I'm a girl..."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it's the same for girls, Hasaki!"

name: Hiroo
message: "Don't say that! She's a girl!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're being too naive, you stupid old man!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll teach Hasaki how I beat Takuji every single time we fought."

name: Hiroo
message: "Jeez, what are you talking about?"
On a summer day...
Hasaki and I were reunited after several years apart.
Even though Hasaki didn't remember me when she saw me. It was like our first time meeting.
Dad said that it was just because she was young, but honestly, I don't remember her being that young when we met before.
It actually seemed like Hasaki's days in Tokyo had been erased.
It was always hectic in the Mamiya house when I was in Tokyo before. All because my mother was involved with that bizarre cult.
She believed that Takuji would become the savior.
As a result, Hasaki was abused by Takuji and his mother.
What an unusual household.
My dad was the only one searching for a peaceful solution.
But to a young child like me, his peaceful solutions just seemed irritating.
Though I didn't manage to solve anything, either.
I just lashed out.
When Hasaki had bruises from the abuse, I would lash out at Takuji and his mother.
I still don't regret that.
But the violence escalated until one of us received a stab wound.
For the record, it was my mother that was injured, but she was also the one holding the knife.
When she pulled out the knife, I fought back and she ended up getting hurt.
And thankfully, I was entrusted to my father's relatives in Sawaimura after that incident.

name: Hiroo
message: "You seem energetic today, Tomosane-kun."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I feel great."

name: Hiroo
message: "Good."
He just said that and laughed as he patted my head.
For some reason, his face looked really sad, but I didn't understand why.
Even after growing so much over the years, I was still just a little brat.
That's why I couldn't understand the meaning hidden behind my father's last smile.
He was always pushing his mind and body to their limits.
He experienced hardships in his life that a brat like me could never understand.
All for the sake of his family.
That was the last time...
That I ever saw my father smile.
